item.title: When is the next results date for B2B Software Technologies Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for B2B Software Technologies Ltd is April 11, 2026. Time: Apr 07 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.description: The next results date for Aqylon Nexus Ltd is April 8, 2026. Time: Apr 07 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: 151.94% Stock Return, 62% Profit Growth: What's Driving Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd's Multibagger Rerating?
item.description: A 151.94% stock return in one year. A 62% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers — roughly 90 percentage points — is driven largely by the market's willingness to pay a significantly higher multiple for each rupee of Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd's earnings. That premium valuation is the central story behind this multibagger's performance. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:15 PM IST

item.title: Nureca Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Nureca Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Healthcare Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Britannia Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Britannia Industries Ltd, a leading FMCG large-cap stock, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This technical development suggests a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raises concerns about its near to medium-term price trajectory amid mixed fundamental and technical indicators. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: RDB Rasayans Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: RDB Rasayans Ltd, a micro-cap player in the packaging sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about long-term weakness despite its strong historical performance. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Tirupati Forge Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Declining Price
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Tirupati Forge Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 7 Apr 2026. However, the stock declined 2.20% on the day the cross formed, while monthly technical indicators remain mildly bearish. This divergence between the moving averages and price action calls for a detailed examination of the signal's reliability. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: IDBI Bank Ltd. Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: IDBI Bank Ltd., a mid-cap player in the private sector banking industry, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Gujarat Intrux Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Gujarat Intrux Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 7 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with weekly indicators largely supportive but monthly momentum showing mild bearishness. This divergence invites a closer examination of the signal's reliability. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: 3B Blackbio DX Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: 3B Blackbio DX Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Healthcare Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the near to medium term. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: The Ramco Cements Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: The Ramco Cements Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook amid already subdued performance metrics. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Orient Beverages Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 0.67%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Orient Beverages Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 7 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 0.67% on the day the cross formed, while monthly technical indicators remain bearish. This divergence between the moving averages and price action demands a closer look at the broader technical and fundamental context. Time: Apr 07 2026 06:00 PM IST
